title: Jekyll
excerpt: description: Deploy a Jekyll site to Cloudflare Pages. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/pages/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. [Jekyll ↗](https://jekyllrb.com/) is an open-source framework for creating websites, based around Markdown with Liquid templates. In this guide, you will create a new Jekyll application and deploy it using Cloudflare Pages. You use the `jekyll` CLI to create a new Jekyll site. If you have an existing Jekyll site on GitHub Pages, refer to [the Jekyll migration guide](https://developers.cloudflare.com/pages/migrations/migrating-jekyll-from-github-pages/).
